authHead: Your Tech Journey, All in One Place
desc: From the latest flagships to certified pre-owned devices — buy, rent, repair, or sell all in one place.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailSentDesc: Check your inbox for the password reset link. It may take a minute.

loginPrompt.title: Don't lose your finds!
loginPrompt.desc: Log in to save your favorite items to your wishlist and access them from any device.

otp.title: Check your email
otp.desc: We sent a 6-digit verification code to your email address.
otp.successMsg: Your account has been verified successfully.
otp.successSub: You can now sign in with your account.
otp.resentMsg: A new verification code has been sent to your email.
otp.limitSub: Request a new code to continue.
otp.limitNotice: You've reached the maximum attempts. Please request a new code.
otp.incompleteMsg: Please fill in all 6 digits before submitting.
